chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-459 of 2023 Crl. Misc. Application No.S-491 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. HEARING OF CASE For hearing of main case 11-03-2024 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for applicant in Crl.M.A.No.S- 459/23 Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate for applicant in Crl.M.A.No.S- 491/23 and for respondent No.4 in connected matter. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J.-, By consent, these applications are allowed and the impugned order dated 16.06.2023, passed by learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace, Khairpur is set aside. SHO, P.S, Faiz Ganj-Khairpur is directed to register FIR. However, I.O shall record version of both the parties: complainant and accused, as both the parties claim that deceased Mst. Maqsoodan was murdered by other side. After recording version of both the parties, proper investigation be conducted by the police officer not below the rank of DSP and only on the basis of sufficient evidence, action including arrest in accordance with law shall be taken against the one who is responsible for murder of deceased and Challan be submitted. These Crl. Misc. Applications are disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad
